core_loop: Architecture is delivery plumbing, not a choice surface: every subsystem emits/consumes Keys through one update rule; the loop it enables is player action → Key emission → observer interpretation → (maybe) cross-scale ripple → next player decision informed by consequence.

decision_points.options: whether a personal-scene outcome escalates to a faction-level consequence
decision_points.note: 7 named triggers, capped amounts, deferred-apply timing — best-specified direction in the spine

decision_points.where: Strategic Domain Action → sub-scale ripple (§12.4 down-seams)
decision_points.options: player commits a Domain Action expecting it to be felt by NPCs/settlements
decision_points.note: registry says npc_behavior/piety_track/settlement_economy consume it; domain_actions emitter doesn't populate targets[] — consequence may not land

decision_points.options: whether acting vs not-acting on a strain/echo loop produces a settled, legible outcome
decision_points.note: termination proven, convergence not — the loop can persist at bounded amplitude with no proven resolution

decision_points.options: player queries backward from a Key to understand causation
decision_points.note: mechanism exists but UI is unbuilt (Phase 5a) and determinism is conditional on open ORD-3/ORD-4 flags

north_star.collision_feed: This lane supplies the only channel collisions can travel through (Key emit/observe, all six directions declared mechanism-complete). Its completeness gates whether cross-system collisions actually reach the player — currently the bottom-up (Domain Echo) path is rich, but the top-down/strategic path is proven-possible, not proven-delivered.
north_star.verdict: Points at the North Star in design (a genuinely uniform, direction-neutral delivery mechanism) but under-delivers in practice: the modules most central to player strategic choice (domain_actions, engine_clock) are the least-specified, and several declared consumer edges are unpopulated or unconsumed.

nq.observation: Key vocabulary is NOT one language across producers: 3 of 44 registered types (state.opinion_revised, scene.gossip, state.concern_resolved) declare default_permanence="structural" / default_time_horizon="medium", values outside the substrate's own §2.2 enum {transient/persistent/indelible} / {immediate/near/far}.
Termination (per-tick, per-cascade) is proven; cross-tick convergence is explicitly not, conditional on two open rulings (decay() contractivity, D.6 disjointness).
Domain Echo's Sufficient Scope list (7 named triggers) models a real Renaissance dynamic — personal acts of institutional visibility escalating to faction consequence — cleanly grounded.

Direction-as-emergent-property (targets[]/scale_signature/visibility, not a channel-per-direction) is a genuinely elegant unification, explicitly ratified as closing the top-down gap without new apparatus.

threadwork_junctures.juncture: Thread op as a registered Key type (scene.thread_operation, meta.thread_woven)
threadwork_junctures.evidence: key_type_registry_v30.md §2, §8 — but scene.thread_operation payload flagged [STUB: payload inferred, not canon-specified]

threadwork_junctures.juncture: Thread Domain Echo — up-ripple distinct from Sufficient Scope
threadwork_junctures.evidence: scale_transitions_v30.md §5.6 (ED-673), three named fire conditions incl. Gap/Lock/Knot creation at Territorial+ scale

legibility.note: The substrate supplies the mechanism (targets/impact_vector/visibility, causes[] walk) to compute the three questions, but the player-facing surface (the "Why?" diagnostic) is unbuilt (Phase 5a), and its determinism is conditional on open ordering flags (ORD-3/ORD-4) — capability architected, not yet deliverable.

degenerate_candidates: Strategic Domain Actions resolve at the faction-stat ledger with no verified path to felt NPC/settlement consequence — scale_transitions_v30.md §12.4 + module_contracts.yaml domain_actions entry (consumes:[], doc:null)
Cross-tick echo loop can persist at bounded-but-nonzero amplitude indefinitely with no proven settling point — propagation_spec_v1.md §4.3

directions.top-down: §12 proves top-down delivery mechanism-complete but 8 named down-seams remain emitter-unpopulated, so the guarantee is proven, not yet exercised.
directions.bottom-up: Domain Echo is the best-specified direction in the whole spine — capped, timed, and trigger-enumerated.
directions.lateral: Same-scale observer resolution is architecturally uniform, but the flagship lateral edge (scene.combat_resolved) is declared-but-unconsumed.
directions.diagonal: causes[] chaining is real but sparse (~15%) and now overloaded to also carry runtime re-entrancy parentage without a distinguishing field.
directions.forwards: Key→Resource mapping is clean on paper but the Godot port is 1/27 modules and non-compilable — forward realization lags the spec.
directions.backwards: Unusually low lineage risk: each doc (substrate, doctrine, propagation spec) explicitly scopes what it does NOT prove, so supersession/staleness risk is self-flagged rather than silent.

findings.claim: The propagation spec proves per-tick/per-cascade termination but explicitly not cross-tick convergence, leaving the up/down echo loop able to persist at bounded amplitude for the whole campaign with no determinate settling point.

domain_actions — the module implementing the player's primary strategic decision (Domain Actions) — is doc:null, [ASSUMPTION]-resolver-grade, and the source of 3 of the 8 unpopulated §12.4 down-seams, so the headline player choice may resolve mechanically without ever reaching NPCs/settlements.

Three Class-B Key types declare permanence/time_horizon values ("structural", "medium") outside the substrate's own canonical enum, so the Key vocabulary is demonstrably not one language across producers.

The runaway-cascade guard (CASCADE_DEPTH_MAX, EMISSIONS_PER_TICK_MAX) that makes the termination theorem meaningful consists of unbacked integers with no cited canonical_source, homed in a module (engine_clock) whose doc:null grade is itself unresolved.

Three incompatible RNG contracts coexist unreconciled (substrate per-emission seed vs propagation spec single global stream vs conversion strategy's named-draw service); the player-facing "Why?" diagnostic depends on the replay determinism this collision puts in question.

scene.combat_resolved is registered with declared consumers (npc_behavior, faction_layer, articulation) that do not actually list it in their own consumes:, so a lateral/up delivery edge the registry claims is covered is silently unreached.

causes[] simultaneously carries authored provenance (cycle-checked) and runtime re-entrancy parentage (cascade depth reconstruction) with no field distinguishing the two, so replay-based depth reconstruction is ambiguous.
scene.thread_operation is a registered Key type but its payload is explicitly unratified stub content, so threadwork's substrate representation is present-but-thin rather than fully specified.
